fields.name: Converted Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the VAT rate change log entry was created.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Record ID
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Old Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general product posting group before the VAT rate change conversion.

fields.name: New Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new general product posting group after the VAT rate change conversion.

fields.name: Old VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT product posting group before the VAT rate change conversion.

fields.name: New VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new VAT product posting group after the VAT rate change conversion.

fields.name: Converted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the VAT rate change conversion.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the VAT rate change conversion.
